APIKeyAuthenticationModel.description:
API key authentication.

Used by: Generic REST APIs, some cloud services.
All fields are key references resolved from environment declarations.

api_key.description: Key reference for API key value
api_key.title: Api Key

header_name.description: Key reference for HTTP header name (default: 'X-API-Key')
header_name.title: Header Name

APIKeyAuthenticationModel.title: APIKeyAuthenticationModel

AWSAuthenticationModel.description:
AWS access key authentication.

All fields are key references resolved from environment declarations.

access_key_id.description: Key reference for AWS access key ID
access_key_id.title: Access Key Id

secret_access_key.description: Key reference for AWS secret access key
secret_access_key.title: Secret Access Key

session_token.description: Key reference for AWS session token (temporary credentials)
session_token.title: Session Token

role_arn.description: Key reference for AWS IAM role ARN for AssumeRole
role_arn.title: Role Arn

AWSAuthenticationModel.title: AWSAuthenticationModel

AuthenticationModel.description:
Authentication configuration for cloud provider or integration access.

Specifies authentication method and corresponding credentials as key references.
Keys are resolved at runtime from centralized environment declarations.
AuthenticationModel.title: AuthenticationModel

CLIAuthenticationModel.description:
CLI-based authentication using local credentials.

Uses existing CLI authentication: az login, gcloud auth, aws configure.
No credential references needed - uses ambient credentials.

use_cli.description: Use local CLI authentication (az, gcloud, aws)
use_cli.title: Use Cli

CLIAuthenticationModel.title: CLIAuthenticationModel

CertificateAuthenticationModel.description:
Certificate-based authentication (mTLS).

All fields are key references resolved from environment declarations.

certificate_path.description: Key reference for client certificate file path
certificate_path.title: Certificate Path

private_key_path.description: Key reference for private key file path
private_key_path.title: Private Key Path

ca_bundle_path.description: Key reference for CA bundle file path
ca_bundle_path.title: Ca Bundle Path

certificate_password.description: Key reference for certificate password (if encrypted)
certificate_password.title: Certificate Password

CertificateAuthenticationModel.title: CertificateAuthenticationModel

CommonLifecycleModel.description:
Lifecycle phases for common models.
Maps phase names to phase configurations.
Phase names follow pattern: {command}_{action}_{suffix}
Examples: config_clear, config_fetch, deploy_plan_before, deploy_apply_after
CommonLifecycleModel.title: CommonLifecycleModel

CommonLifecyclePhaseModel.description: Model for common lifecycle phase with script validation.
CommonLifecyclePhaseModel.title: CommonLifecyclePhaseModel

GCPAuthenticationModel.description:
Google Cloud Platform service account authentication.

All fields are key references resolved from environment declarations.

project_id.description: Key reference for GCP project ID
project_id.title: Project Id

credentials_json.description: Key reference for GCP service account JSON credentials (as string content)
credentials_json.title: Credentials Json

credentials_file.description: Key reference for path to GCP service account JSON file
credentials_file.title: Credentials File

service_account_email.description: Key reference for GCP service account email
service_account_email.title: Service Account Email

GCPAuthenticationModel.title: GCPAuthenticationModel

ManagedIdentityAuthenticationModel.description:
Managed/Workload Identity authentication.

Uses cloud provider managed identity (Azure MSI, GCP Workload Identity, AWS IAM Roles).
No credential references needed - uses ambient credentials.

client_id.description: Key reference for user-assigned managed identity client ID (Azure only)
client_id.title: Client Id

ManagedIdentityAuthenticationModel.title: ManagedIdentityAuthenticationModel

OAuth2AuthenticationModel.description:
OAuth2/OpenID Connect authentication.

Used by: Azure (Service Principal), generic OAuth2 providers.
All fields are key references resolved from environment declarations.

client_id.description: Key reference for OAuth2 client/application ID
client_id.title: Client Id

client_secret.description: Key reference for OAuth2 client secret
client_secret.title: Client Secret

tenant_id.description: Key reference for tenant/directory ID (Azure AD, Okta, etc.)
tenant_id.title: Tenant Id

token_url.description: Key reference for OAuth2 token endpoint URL
token_url.title: Token Url

authorization_url.description: Key reference for OAuth2 authorization endpoint URL
authorization_url.title: Authorization Url

OAuth2AuthenticationModel.title: OAuth2AuthenticationModel

ProviderMetaModel.description: Provider metadata including name, annotations, labels, and tags.

tags.description: Optional tags (list of values for categorization)
tags.title: Tags

ProviderMetaModel.title: ProviderMetaModel

ProviderPropertiesModel.description: Provider configuration: cloud provider and datacenter location.

type.description: Cloud or infrastructure provider (e.g., kamatera, local). Must match a provider type in configuration.yaml.
type.title: Type

region.description: Region of the datacenter used by the provider API to select the datacenter
region.title: Region

engine.description: Infrastructure as Code (IaC) engine to use for this provider (e.g., azurerm, azureapi)
engine.title: Engine

version.description: Version constraint for the IaC engine (e.g., '~>3.0')
version.title: Version

ProviderPropertiesModel.title: ProviderPropertiesModel

ProviderReferencesModel.description:
References to variables, secrets, and features required by this provider.

Lists the keys that must be defined in the environment configuration.
Actual values and store backends are defined at environment/workspace level.

variables.description: List of variable keys this provider requires from environment
variables.title: Variables

secrets.description: List of secret keys this provider requires from environment
secrets.title: Secrets

features.description: List of feature flag keys this provider requires from environment
features.title: Features

ProviderReferencesModel.title: ProviderReferencesModel

ProviderSpecModel.description: Provider specification containing properties, references, and lifecycle configuration.

lifecycle.description: IaC workflow lifecycle phases (setup, validate, plan, apply, output, destroy)

properties.description: Provider configuration (cloud provider, IaC tool, datacenter location)

authentication.description: Authentication configuration for cloud provider access

references.description: Variable and secret mappings for runtime configuration injection

custom.description: Optional custom key-value pairs for automation
custom.title: Custom

default_tags.description: Default tags to apply to all resources created by this provider (ignored if provider doesn't support tagging)
default_tags.title: Default Tags

ProviderSpecModel.title: ProviderSpecModel

SAMLAuthenticationModel.description:
SAML 2.0 authentication.

All fields are key references resolved from environment declarations.

idp_entity_id.description: Key reference for SAML Identity Provider entity ID
idp_entity_id.title: Idp Entity Id

sp_entity_id.description: Key reference for SAML Service Provider entity ID
sp_entity_id.title: Sp Entity Id

sso_url.description: Key reference for SAML Single Sign-On URL
sso_url.title: Sso Url

certificate_path.description: Key reference for SAML certificate file path
certificate_path.title: Certificate Path

SAMLAuthenticationModel.title: SAMLAuthenticationModel

ScriptPathModel.description: Individual script with scope and execution metadata.

scope.description: Execution scope - determines how many times script runs (deployment, environment, workspace, provider, resource, module, namespace)

priority.description: Execution order within scope (lower runs first)
priority.title: Priority

ScriptPathModel.title: ScriptPathModel

description: Root model for a provider configuration file.
title: ProviderModel
